commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a root Microsoft tracker Markdown file, a GitHub CLI generator for refreshing that tracker and a PR body from open GitHub issues/PRs, and a release changelog entry.

PR surface: Docs +467, Other +428. Total +895 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blockers: the diff shows the reset-to-open-items generation path, the PR-body edit command, stale committed instructions, and remaining false-positive rows. I did not execute the generator because this review is read-only and the script writes files or can mutate GitHub state.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This protected draft workflow PR needs maintainer decisions about tracker ownership, GitHub PR-body mutation, and closed-history preservation rather than an automated repair lane.
